channel.title: Career Advice on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Career Advice on MinWeb

item.title: Don't Quit Your Job Before Using Your Vacation Days
item.description: Don't leave thousands of dollars on the table when you resign by learning why it is essential to use your earned vacation days before you hand in your notice.

item.title: Why "So What?" Is Not the Cure for Workplace Stress
item.description: Stop the cycle of chronic workplace stress by learning how to balance high-stakes professional accountability with the perspective needed to prevent burnout.

item.title: Why Tim Sweeney’s Comments on Epic Layoffs Sparked Backlash
item.description: Explore why Tim Sweeney’s comments on Epic Games' layoffs triggered industry backlash and what the reaction reveals about leadership and modern talent...
